summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification for 10 listed PRs. The deterministic validator marked 8 open PR targets as security-sensitive, so those exact refs are routed to central security handling with non-mutating route_security actions. The remaining non-security items stay conservative: one active maintainer migration draft is kept related, and one already-merged PR is recorded as skipped keep_closed.
